insured_profile.insured_name: Legal name of the insured entity that will appear on the policy declarations.
insured_profile.operating_as: Trade name used publicly by the insured entity.
insured_profile.address: Primary business address for the insured; used for rating/territory references.
insured_profile.website: Website URL of the insured entity if available.
insured_profile.insurer_website: Website URL of the insurer if available.

primary_contact.name: Day-to-day contact for coverage and binding communications with the insured entity.
primary_contact.title: Position of the primary contact within the organization of the insured entity.
primary_contact.phone: Phone number of the insured primary contact.
primary_contact.email: Email of the insured primary contact.

business_overview.nature_of_operations: Plain-English description of what the insured does, as context for coverage choices.
business_overview.years_in_business: Operating history; signals maturity and risk profile of the insured entity.
business_overview.geographic_scope: Where the insured operates (provinces/regions); useful for jurisdiction/territory context.
business_overview.locations_count: Number of active locations/branches used for high-level exposure sizing of the insured entity.

risk_basis_for_quotation.annual_revenues_usd: Top-line revenue used as an exposure base for several LOBs (e.g., CGL, Cyber) of the insured entity.
risk_basis_for_quotation.payroll_usd: Total payroll used for rating lines like WC/EL or certain contractor classes of the insured entity.
risk_basis_for_quotation.assets_insured_usd: Aggregate limit proxy for property schedules or balance-sheet exposure of the insured entity.

general_info.claims_made_form: Indicates whether the policy is on a claims-made form || type: boolean
general_info.occurrence_form: Indicates whether the policy is on an occurrence form || type: boolean
general_info.per_location_or_project_aggregate: Indicates whether aggregate limits are applied per location or per project || type: boolean
general_info.deductible_type: Type of deductible applied (Per Claim / Per Occurrence / Other)
general_info.deductible_amount_bi_pd: Deductible amount applicable to Bodily Injury or Property Damage
general_info.other_deductible_description: Description and amount of any other deductible specified

program_pricing_matrix.lob: The specific line of business or coverage type this pricing entry applies to (e.g., Property, General Liability, Auto). Must align with the proposal's coverage sections.
program_pricing_matrix.carrier: The insurance carrier or market providing the quoted terms for this line of business.
program_pricing_matrix.base_premium_usd: The quoted premium amount in ($usd) before adding any taxes, fees, or optional charges.
program_pricing_matrix.terrorism_premium_usd: The additional premium amount (if any) charged for terrorism coverage, either mandatory or optional depending on the LOB.
program_pricing_matrix.all_in_premium_usd: The total premium in usd for this line of business, including all mandatory surcharges, policy fees, and the terrorism premium if applicable — but before applying provincial taxes.
program_pricing_matrix.notes: Add brief notes for this line of business in 20–30 words, covering key assumptions, special conditions, deductibles, endorsements, or underwriting remarks relevant to the pricing.

limits.general_aggregate_limit: General Aggregate Limit of the policy || Data Type: Numeric
limits.products_completed_operations_aggregate_: Products/Completed Operations Aggregate Limit (may be same as General Aggregate, INCLUDED, or EXCLUDED) || Data Type: Numeric or String
limits.personal_advertising_injury_limit: Limit for Personal and Advertising Injury coverage || Data Type: Numeric
limits.each_occurrence_limit: Each Occurrence Limit for Bodily Injury and Property Damage || Data Type: Numeric
limits.damage_to_rented_premises_limit: Limit for Damage to Rented Premises per occurrence || Data Type: Numeric
limits.medical_expense_limit: Medical Expense Limit per person || Data Type: Numeric

employee_benefits_liability.employee_benefits_liability_limit: Limit for Employee Benefits Liability coverage || Data Type: Numeric
employee_benefits_liability.ebl_deductible_per_claim: Deductible per claim for Employee Benefits Liability || Data Type: Numeric
employee_benefits_liability.ebl_retroactive_date: Retroactive date for Employee Benefits Liability coverage || Data Type: Date
employee_benefits_liability.ebl_number_of_employees: Total number of employees covered under Employee Benefits Liability || Data Type: Integer
employee_benefits_liability.ebl_number_covered: Number of employees covered under the Employee Benefits Liability endorsement || Data Type: Integer

location_classification_table.location_identifier: Location identifier for the classification table
location_classification_table.location_name: Name or description of the location

classification_details.premium_basis: Comma-separated list of all premium bases applicable to this class code as shown in the document (e.g., 'Premises and Operations, Products/Completed Operations')
classification_details.exposure: Exposure value corresponding to the class code || Data Type: Numeric

premium_breakdown.basis: Premium basis name exactly as shown in the document
premium_breakdown.rate: Rate applied for this basis || Data Type: Numeric
premium_breakdown.premium: Premium amount calculated for this basis || Data Type: Numeric

additional_interests.additional_interest_name: Name of the additional interest (e.g., Mortgagee, Loss Payee)
additional_interests.interest_type: Type of interest (e.g., Additional Insured, Mortgagee, Loss Payee)

premises_info_table.premise_identifier: Premise identifier which is unique and found in the document

driver_info.middle_name: Middle name of the driver (or empty string if unavailable).

vehicle_info.model: Model name using only the make and base model of the vehicle (exactly two words, ignore trims or variants). Example: 'KIA K5', 'BMW X3', 'HONDA ACCORD'.
vehicle_info.primary_use: Purpose of use - must be one of: 'Commute' or 'Pleasure' (choose the closest match).

coverage.coverage_type: Name of the coverage type (e.g., 'Bodily Injury Liability', 'Property Damage Liability', 'Comprehensive', 'Collision', 'Uninsured Motorist') applied to this vehicle.
coverage.coverage_value: Coverage limit and/or deductible. Format varies by coverage type: For liability coverages use 'limit/limit' format (e.g., '100000/300000' for per person/per accident). For deductibles use single amount (e.g., '500', '1000'). For coverages with both, separate with space (e.g., '50000 limit, 250 deductible').

premium_breakdown_per_vehicles.premium_amount: Insurance premium amount for this specific vehicle (numeric string, e.g., '1234.56').

discounts_applied: Names of discounts applied to the policy.
